title: Plant horticultural crops
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plant horticultural crops demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for crop planting operations

pcs.text: Confirm crop planting activities and instructions with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop planting activities and instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop planting activities and instructions with supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for crop planting.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use PPE applicable to the task being undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use PPE applicable to the task being undertaken.
